use_cases: Prominent call-to-action badge in landing page hero sections
Feature announcement pill highlighting new product capabilities
Navigation hint badge directing users to key content areas
Social proof indicator showing user count or rating
Interactive category or filter tag in hero CTA regions
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered hero badge component with smooth entry animations and interactive hover states. Features configurable variants (default, outline, ghost), sizes (sm/md/lg), and animated icon effects including rotation on hover. Designed as a reusable inline badge for hero sections to highlight announcements, CTAs, or feature callouts with subtle polish and micro-interactions.
